overview.name: Auth JWT Self
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT authentication flow without database.
Test flow includes: 1. Authenticate using auth command and credentials file. 2. Send GET request with automatically injected Bearer token. 3. Verify response status = 200. 4. Validate protected response body. 5. Exit auth block. 6. Reset JWT auth test state. 7. Send GET request without token. 8. Verify response status = 401.
This scenario validates: - JWT login flow - Bearer token propagation via auth command - Protected endpoint access - Unauthorized access without token - Reset of in-memory auth state

http.comment: Access protected resource with valid JWT token
Reset JWT auth test data after auth block
Access protected resource without token should fail
